# Weekly Schedule

## Purpose
This file is the planning constraint source for the tutor. It should reflect the learner's real weekly structure, fixed obligations, available work blocks, and practical limits.

## Planning Assumptions
- Time zone: EST/EDT
- Typical planning horizon: 1 month
- Maximum deep-work sessions per week: 10
- Preferred session length: 2 hours
- Minimum viable study block: 30 minutes
- Best energy windows: 9:00-12:00
- Worst energy windows: after 21:00

## Fixed Commitments
| Day                | Start | End   | Commitment           | Flexible? | Notes |
|--------------------|-------|-------|----------------------|-----------|-------|
| Monday-Friday      | 06:00 | 09:00 | Kids morning routine | No        |       |
| Monday-Friday      | 11:00 | 11:30 | Exercise             | Yes       |       |
| Monday-Friday      | 12:30 | 13:00 | Lunch                | Yes       |       |
| Monday-Friday      | 16:45 | 17:30 | Kids evening pickup  | No        |       |
| Tuesday-Friday     | 18:00 | 19:30 | Make/eat dinner      | No        |       |
| Wednesday-Thursday | 09:00 | 11:00 | Clients              | No        |       |

## Available Learning Blocks
| Day           | Start | End   | Duration  | Energy Level | Recommended Work Type                         | Notes |
|---------------|-------|-------|-----------|--------------|-----------------------------------------------|-------|
| Monday-Friday | 09:00 | 11:00 | 2 hours   | high         | reading, paper pencil math stats, code review |       |
| Monday-Friday | 13:00 | 15:00 | 2 hours   | high         | project dev, writing                          |       |
| Monday-Friday | 15:00 | 16:30 | 1.5 hours | mid          | reflection, planning, review, communication   |       |
| Saturday      | 07:00 | 09:00 | 2 hours   | high         | personal projects                             |       |


## Recurring Constraints
- No cognitively heavy work after 9 PM
- Morning is best for long project work

## Recurring Opportunities
- Working from home, build in breaks and short walks
- Sunday afternoon is good for weekly reset

## Current Season Notes
- Workload changes: 
- Family / personal changes:
- Upcoming deadlines:
- Travel / disruptions:
- Stress or recovery notes:

## Non-Negotiables
- Sleep boundary: 22:00-06:00
- Exercise / health boundary: 3 hours per week minimum
- Family / care boundary: morning and evening kid care is non-negotiable
- No-overload rule: tdb

## Planning Preferences
- Prefer project work vs drills: ready for real world work like the CCR, but recognize need for foundation
- Prefer weekday vs weekend load: school hours are prime working time
- Preferred sequencing: tbd
- How aggressive the plan should be: highly aggressive

## Update Log
- Date: 03/23/2026
- What changed: initial schedule
- Why it changed: initial schedule
